sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_hits (SearchPhrase String, UserID UInt32);
UPDATE test_hits SET UserID = 5 WHERE SearchPhrase = 'test';
SELECT SearchPhrase, COUNT(DISTINCT UserID) AS unique_users FROM test_hits GROUP BY SearchPhrase ORDER BY unique_users DESC;
SELECT SearchPhrase, COUNT(DISTINCT UserID) AS u FROM test_hits WHERE SearchPhrase <> '' GROUP BY SearchPhrase ORDER BY u DESC LIMIT 5;
